title: The Troof Score
purpose: Explain the transparent A–F trust grade and that it is itself sealable.

style.grade: A in green, F in red, B/C/D neutral

pillars.name: Identity / canonicity
pillars.detail: spoofs SUI symbol but != 0x2::sui::SUI → critical fail

honesty.label: not verifiable via RPC (shown, never faked)

annotations: Every penalty cites the raw on-chain field it came from (credit-report style).
Footer: 'rubric troof_score_v1 — and this whole grade can be sealed into a proof.'
Inputs come from Tatum Sui RPC.
